changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS noise_filter ( ua_name TEXT NOT NULL, uri_stem TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ua_name, uri_stem) )
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO noise_filter (ua_name, uri_stem) VALUES ('Mastodon', '/')
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO noise_filter (ua_name, uri_stem) VALUES ('Misskey', '/')
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO noise_filter (ua_name, uri_stem) VALUES ('Feedbin', '/feed.xml')
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO noise_filter (ua_name, uri_stem) VALUES ('Feedly', '/feed.xml')
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO noise_filter (ua_name, uri_stem) VALUES ('Reeder', '/feed.xml')
